lines.speaker: Guildmaster Apatura
lines.text: Oh, you're a new face around here, aren't you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am indeed. Just exploring the savannah.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Apatura
lines.text: Well, I'm Apatura. Let me welcome you to our small corner of Varlamore.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Apatura
lines.text: Nilsal, hunter.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nilsal, Apatura.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Apatura
lines.text: I see you've been doing a lot of work for the guild of late. Would you like to learn a bit more about our history?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Absolutely.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Apatura
lines.text: Here's a little snippet about our original construction, from right back when we were first established.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, thank you.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Apatura
lines.text: Alright. You can grab it from my bookshelf upstairs whenever you want to read it.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Apatura
lines.text: Your commitment to helping our guild is commendable, iknami.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's good to be helping, guildmaster.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Apatura
lines.text: If you want to learn about our history, I have a document here you can read if you'd like.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That would be interesting.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, thank you.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Apatura
lines.text: You can take it from my shelves when you're ready to read it. Just head up that ladder over there.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Apatura
lines.text: You have proven yourself a true ally of our guild, iknami.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Apatura
lines.text: As a personal reward for your help, you can have this key to open the chest on the floor above.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do here?

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Apatura
lines.text: We're mostly here to keep an eye on the local animal populations, and provide animal parts to the city.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Apatura
lines.text: As for me personally, I'm the current master of this guild.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Current master?

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Apatura
lines.text: A hunter's work is dangerous. We tend to go through members faster than other guilds. That said, I'm usually too busy with politics and paperwork to go out hunting these days.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd better be off.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Apatura
lines.text: Nilsal, hunter.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nilsal, Apatura.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Apatura
lines.text: Is that a skillcape you have with you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It is.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Apatura
lines.text: Would you like me to enhance it with the ability to teleport directly to the guild?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Apatura
lines.text: Kuani! That should be done for you now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.
